lede.en: TODO: intro to wiring — bring the two steppers, the tapping solenoid, the camera, and power together at the control board.
lede.zh: TODO：接线部分引言——把两个步进电机、点击电磁铁、摄像头和电源都接到控制板上。

body.en: Never plug in or remove a driver while the board is powered.
body.zh: 板子通电时，切勿插拔驱动。

body.en: Match each driver's pin labels to the board silkscreen before pressing it home — a reversed TMC2209 can burn out on power-up.
body.zh: 压到位之前，让每个驱动的引脚标识对准板上的丝印——TMC2209 装反，一上电就可能烧坏。

body.en: Colored to colored, black to black.
body.zh: 彩色引脚对彩色引脚，黑色引脚对黑色引脚。

labels.style: position:absolute; left:25mm; top:72mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;
position:absolute; left:50mm; top:69mm; font-size:10pt; font-weight:400; color:var(--accent); z-index:2;

body.en: The board uses standard GRBL axis outputs, remapped as follows: the X-axis motor driver drives Motor B, the Y1-axis motor driver drives Motor A, and the Spindle output drives the solenoid (in place of a spindle).
body.zh: 控制板使用标准 GRBL 轴输出，并按如下方式重新映射：X 轴电机驱动器驱动 电机 B，Y1 轴电机驱动器驱动 电机 A，主轴 (Spindle) 输出驱动电磁铁（代替主轴）。

body.en: Use a 12 V 2 A DC adapter.
body.zh: 使用 12V 2A 直流电源适配器。

body.en: The Spindle output (to the solenoid) is not polarity-sensitive — either lead can go to either terminal.
body.zh: 主轴 (Spindle) 输出（接电磁铁）不分极性——两根线接哪个端子都行。

body.en: The solenoid's stock leads don't reach the control board. Splice extra hookup wire onto both the 12 V and GND leads.
body.zh: 电磁铁原装引线够不到控制板。给 12V 和 GND 两根引线各接长一段导线。

body.en: Solder each joint and cover it with heat-shrink. Offset the two splices about 20 mm so the insulated joints don't sit side by side.
body.zh: 每个接头先焊接，再套热缩管。把两个接头错开约 20 mm，别让它们并排挤在一起。
